basic_details.job_title: DHS Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 71 DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Chengalpattu (DHS Chengalpattu) DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website chengalpattu.nic.in. A total of 71 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 40 years.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th with Biology/Botany and Zoology, GNM/B.Sc Nursing, ANM, M.A Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry), B.Com with Tally, Graduate with Diploma in Computer Application, Any Degree with Computer Knowledge, 10th Std, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Health Inspector: 12th with Biology/Botany and Zoology. Must have passed Tamil Language as a subject in SSLC level. Must possess two years for Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Male) / Health Inspector (Male) / Sanitary Inspector Course training offered by recognized private institution / Trust / Universities / including Gandhigram Rural Institute training course certificate granted by the Director of Public Health and Preventive Medicine Mid Level Health Provider: GNM/ B.Sc (Nursing) qualification from the institute by the Indian Nursing Council Staff Nurse (UHWC): GNM/ B.Sc (Nursing) qualification from the institute by the Indian Nursing Council UHN (ANM): ANM qualification from Government or Government approved private Auxiliary Nurse Midwife School which is recognized by Indian Nursing Council Psychiatric Social Worker: M.A Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry) / Master of Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry) with Six month training at identified institution Block Account Assistant: B.Com with Tally Data Entry Operator: Computer Graduate or any Graduate with Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized University Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator: Any Degree With Computer Knowledge Office Assistant: 10th Std MMU Cleaner: 8th Pass Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: 8th Pass

selection_process: Merit based on 10th/12th/Degree marks Experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Chengalpattu DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://chengalpattu.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Chengalpattu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHS Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHS Chengalpattu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Health Inspector: 12th with Biology/Botany and Zoology. Must have passed Tamil Language as a subject in SSLC level. Must possess two years for Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Male) / Health Inspector (Male) / Sanitary Inspector Course training offered by recognized private institution / Trust / Universities / including Gandhigram Rural Institute training course certificate granted by the Director of Public Health and Preventive Medicine Mid Level Health Provider: GNM/ B.Sc (Nursing) qualification from the institute by the Indian Nursing Council Staff Nurse (UHWC): GNM/ B.Sc (Nursing) qualification from the institute by the Indian Nursing Council UHN (ANM): ANM qualification from Government or Government approved private Auxiliary Nurse Midwife School which is recognized by Indian Nursing Council Psychiatric Social Worker: M.A Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry) / Master of Social Work (Medical and Psychiatry) with Six month training at identified institution Block Account Assistant: B.Com with Tally Data Entry Operator: Computer Graduate or any Graduate with Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized University Assistant Cum Data Entry Operator: Any Degree With Computer Knowledge Office Assistant: 10th Std MMU Cleaner: 8th Pass Multi Purpose Hospital Worker: 8th Pass

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 40 years.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Merit based on 10th/12th/Degree marks Experience Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Chengalpattu DEO, Office Assistant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://chengalpattu.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in DHS Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 71 vacancies for Various Posts under the District Health Society Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026. These positions are contractual and offer a good opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts recruitment is 09 July 2026. Candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts is offline. Interested candidates need to download the application form, fill it, attach required documents, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for DHS Chengalpattu recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants for all posts under DHS Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 is 40 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms, candidates should check the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Various Posts in DHS Chengalpattu?
faq.answer: The salary for the Various Posts ranges from Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 27,000 per month. Specific salaries vary depending on the post, as detailed in the official notification and salary section.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key qualifications required for these vacancies?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from 8th Pass for MMU Cleaner and Multi Purpose Hospital Worker, 10th Std for Office Assistant, 12th with Biology for Health Inspector, to GNM/B.Sc Nursing, B.Com with Tally, and M.A Social Work for other specialized roles.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts?
faq.answer: To apply, download the application form from the official website, fill it accurately, attach self-attested copies of documents, and send it via Speed Post/Registered Post to the address mentioned in the official notification before 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for DHS Chengalpattu Various Posts includes a merit-based evaluation of marks from 10th/12th/Degree, consideration of experience, and a final interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on these criteria.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for DHS Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 can be found on the official website, chengalpattu.nic.in. A direct link to the notification is also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
